title: First Philippic: Against the Tyrant
description: The speech that gave English the word 'philippic' — Demosthenes warns Athens that Philip of Macedon will destroy their freedom.
introduction: The speech that gave English the word 'philippic' — Demosthenes warns Athens that Philip of Macedon will destroy their freedom.

translation.text: The thing to do is not to speculate on what the future may bring, but to be certain that it will bring disaster unless you attend to your duty.
